description: Force IDR keyframes every 2 seconds via the canonical HLS/DASH idiom `-force_key_frames "expr:gte(t,n_forced*2)"`. Mirrors `ffmpeg -y -i in.mp4 -c:v libx264 -force_key_frames "expr:gte(t,n_forced*2)" out.mp4`. The runtime parses the spec at config-load (rejects malformed expressions up-front), builds a per-encoder forceKeyFramesMatcher in handleEncoder, and stamps `frame.pict_type = AV_PICTURE_TYPE_I` before SendFrame on each match — libavcodec honours that as an IDR request regardless of the encoder's GOP cadence (faithful port of fftools/ffmpeg_enc.c::forced_kf_apply).
